windows.embed_text_v2: pouring molten wax from tilted vat into long factory dipping trough, rows of white taper candles hanging on wicks from rack dripping wax, industrial candle dipping line
windows.summary_v2: In a candle factory, molten wax is poured into a long dipping trough beneath racks of hanging taper candles being repeatedly dip-coated.

tags_v2.action: pouring molten wax into dipping trough

seconds_v2.desc: In a candle factory, rows of white wax-coated taper candles hang from a rack above a trough while a large tilted vat of molten wax sits at right; a 'Youtube Professor of Making' watermark is top-right
Molten wax pours from the tilted vat into the long trough as hanging dipped tapers drip wax from the overhead rack
A stream of liquid wax cascades from the metal vat into the dipping trough below the rows of suspended candle wicks
The pouring wax fills the channel, white solidified drips hanging off the tapered candles on the rack to the left
Liquid wax continues flowing from the vat lip into the trough, the bath rippling beneath the hanging dipped candles
The molten wax bath swirls as it is poured, long icicle-like wax drips coating the rows of factory tapers
Wax keeps streaming into the trough, a worker's hand faintly visible steadying the tilted vat at right
The vat pours a thick rope of molten wax into the dipping channel beside the rack of suspended candle wicks
Final frame of wax flowing from the vat into the trough, rows of dipped white tapers dripping along the left rack
